issues.detail: The instructions cover the happy path but do not comprehensively address all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Postgres MCP server (TypeScript)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invented an HTTP/Express protocol with no SDK, no zod validation, no SELECT-only enforcement, no timeout, and no isError; treatment used McpServer + StdioServerTransport with all guardrails.

scenarios.name: Jira MCP server (Python FastMCP)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote a Flask app with a hardcoded token instead of FastMCP; treatment used @mcp.tool() with type hints, env-var credentials, readable text returns, and the matching Claude Desktop config.
